# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities privately — do not open a public issue.

Email **security@your-domain.example** (replace with a real address, or enable
[GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing/privately-reporting-a-security-vulnerability)
under Settings → Security → Advisories) with a description of the issue and
steps to reproduce. We'll acknowledge receipt and follow up with next steps.
